subcodes.first_line: O Zaynu'l-'Abidin! We made mention of thee aforetime, and now again hath Muhammad-Qablí-'Alí appeared before the Wronged One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا زین العابدین از قبل ترا ذکر نمودیم حال مجدد جناب محمد قبل علی نزد مظلوم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @power of the Manifestation of God
